calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dennis Vann for Brenda Downs, Successor Trustee (via Zoom).
Collette Davis for Maxine Downs, Interested Party (via Zoom).

Discussion was held regarding whether San Francisco County is the appropriate venue for this action. The court noted that all parties are based in Los Angeles County. Counsel agreed to refile the petition in Los Angeles County. The court orders the matter off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
